description: Use this API to return the number of Time Series Power Flow profile data column count for a curve set. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr, count = gettspfprofiledatacolumncount(curvesetid)

parameters.name: curvesetid
parameters.description: Curve set id. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: count
return_values.description: Number of time series power flow data. (output).
